test_cases.title: User must provide a payment method to complete the upgrade
preconditions: User is logged in with a free account
steps: Navigate to the upgrade or premium page
Attempt to complete the upgrade without entering payment details
test_cases.expected_result: The system requires payment method entry before allowing the upgrade to proceed

test_cases.title: Premium features are accessible after a successful account upgrade
preconditions: User has completed a successful premium upgrade
steps: Log in as the upgraded user
Navigate to a feature that is restricted to premium accounts
test_cases.expected_result: The premium feature is accessible and fully functional for the upgraded user

notes: The requirement lacks specifics on the payment flow, pricing, and the full feature set. Two core billing integrity tests are provided: payment gate enforcement and premium access after upgrade. A confirmation step before charging was not explicitly tested as the flow is unspecified — recommend clarifying the checkout UX.
